welcome.landingText: Ha-app shelkhem la-laila kedei litfos uleshatek rega'im, polaroid achad akhar ha-sheni.
welcome.installHint: Shimu et appat ha-chatuna al mashek ha-bayit le-experience chalaqah yoter.
welcome.installDescription: Ha-dapdefan shelkhem yachol le-hatkin et ha-app mikan.
welcome.iosInstallHint: Be-iPhone, petach et masheket ha-share u-vchar Hosef le-Meshek HaBayit.
welcome.greetingSubText: Hosifu et shimkhem kedei she'ha-tmunot yishar'u mechubarot aleikhem kol ha-laila.

instructions.body: Efshar le'shatek ad 20 tmuna me'ha'layla. Kol zikaron she'ta'alu kan yira le'kulam, kedei she'ha'chagiga tisha'er meshutefet v'yafa.
instructions.notes: Ttse'u tmuna achshav o t'alu achat acharei.

app.linkPrompt: Hosefu et shimkhem be-hesber ha-briha kedei she'ha-tmunot yu'khsru aleikhem.
